key_concerns: Single monolithic test file (2261 lines) — must split per-component before 100 components
Single barrel + single bundle — subpath exports needed for tree-shaking
47 peer deps is heavy — optional peer deps for heavy components
data.feature_request_analysis: #5 useIntersectionObserver → src/hooks/, separate entry point. #7 Toast queue → extend existing toast.tsx with useReducer, backward-compatible. #8 Keyboard shortcuts → useHotkeys hook + HotkeyProvider, separate entry. #9 Animation presets → CSS variables first (zero bundle cost), optional AnimationProvider.
